case_title: DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. VS. LUIS F. SANDOVAL EK

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-28-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANDOVAL EK, LUIS F. $660.33 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $750.33 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
